entry.title: 'Cause You Love Somebody
entry.summary:
Author: love_me_anyway_118

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,856Chapters: 25/25Kudos: 252

Summary: Buck would do anything for Theo, especially adopting him. It wasn't an easy path but Buck was willing. The problem was that Theo had been thorough a lot in a short amount of time and he needed stability in his life right now, which meant two parents and preferably a kid.That wasn't Bucks strong suit.But it was Eddie's.

entry.title: There's No You Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: 79KJ01

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,451Chapters: 6/30Kudos: 21

Summary: “Where are you driving from?” Eddie asked, his mouth moving before he could stop it, his brain deciding that awkward small talk was infinitely safer than just standing there vibrating with nervous energy. “East,” the guy replied with a casual, fluid roll of his broad shoulders. “Farther than I wanted to be, honestly. And definitely longer than I originally planned.” Before the army, before Los Angeles, and long before the 118, there was a dusty gas station on the edge of El Paso, a broken-down Jeep with Pennsylvania plates, and a stranger named Evan. For years, they were each other's entire world, surviving basic training, AIT, and a grueling deployment side-by-side. But a devastating wave of silence and a massive misunderstanding tore them apart, leaving behind a deep, soul-cutting ache and a history neither of them ever truly moved on from. Now, the past has finally caught up to the present. Standing under the harsh fluorescent lights of Station 118, Eddie and Evan are forced to navigate the wreckage of the life they left behind—and the terrifying truth of everything they never stopped running from.

entry.title: A Year Of You And Me
entry.summary:
Author: LibbyWrites

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,429Chapters: 162/?Kudos: 109

Summary: In spite of his skepticism, Eddie decides to start journaling, following his therapist's advice. The man gives him a list of 365 prompts and questions to write about each day, to help him untangle the mess his brain has become. Under the knots, he might find much more than just peace of mind.

entry.title: The Secret Task Chaos
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,857Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: Maddie and Buck start a game where they give each other secret tasks that the other has to do. The only other people who know about the game are Jee, Theo and then Chris who is in charge of the rules and making sure they play fair. Chris also runs the point system and whoever gets 100 points first will win unless one of Buck or Maddie tells someone else about the game and then the other person wins.When establishing the rules they decide that if Buck wins then Maddie has to wear a poo emoji hat for a week and can’t tell anyone why she is wearing it. If Maddie wins then Buck has to tell Eddie how he feels about him. Both siblings are determined to win and chaos ensues as their secret tasks for each other get more and more crazy.

entry.title: Your holes for our forgiveness
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,475Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: "I don't know if I can," Buck whispered hoarsely."I told you once that I trusted you with my son. I told you you were the only other person I'd ever trust with him. That's still true. You're it for me, Buck. Both of you." He leaned until their foreheads met, whispering against his trembling lips. "Forever.""Eddie..." he looked devastated. On the edge of an abysmal precipice Eddie was waiting for him in with open arms."I love you so much." He brushed their lips together in a ghost of a kiss. "I want to share this with you too. I want to share everything with you. Even him. Please, Buck. I love you.""I love you too," murmured Buck, and it sounded like surrender. OR : Eddie has never been happier than since his son became his fleshlight, but what happens when he realize only one thing could make him even happier ?OR : Buck was sure of two things : he had strong moral principles, he would do anything for Eddie. He's just figuring how one of these things is truer than the other.

entry.title: Do The Mountains Call Your Name Louder Than I Did?
entry.summary:
Author: Lexicloud

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,400Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 17

Summary: Buck is leaving, he never thought he would, let alone want to. But sometimes you have to give up a lot to find the peace and happiness you deserve. He always thought everyone leaves, nobody stays and now he understands why, sometimes you have to. It was he's turn to make the hard choice, he's turn for another adventure, he's turn to do something for himself. Buck was done giving up his joy and peace for others, especially when they wouldn't do the same. He was done letting others decide who he was, done being talk down to, like he hasn't grown and changed. He was scared, excited, but ready. Eddie thought he would come back and would let himself have the joy in his life for the first time, he thought this was the beginning to something real and honest not just to himself but to people in life. He was gay and proud and ready to share his truth, but most importantly ready to admit he had fallen in love with his best friend. But nothing went as planned....   or Buck leaves to start a new life in Switzerland, and years will go by before Eddie and Buck make it back to each other with new challenges and new heartbreaks.

entry.title: [podfic] Alone In The Dark With You
entry.summary:
Author: pods (be_brave13)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: Buck couldn’t remain here alone with all his racing thoughts. Catastrophizing. That’s what his therapist called it. He had to move. He continued trying to dig his way with his good hand, but the way the rocks had fallen, if he removed one, another took its place. It was like he was inside an hourglass.But he wouldn’t give up.There. Was he hearing things? A scraping sound.His adrenaline spiked. He pawed at the rocks again, because noise meant movement and movement meant—“Buck?”“Eddie?” Buck rasped.He was alive! Eddie was alive.(Or Buck and Eddie get trapped in a cave-in and things go from bad to worse.)podfic length: 1:44:33

entry.title: The Origin Of Buck Cookies = A kiss
entry.summary:
Author: villayuly1987

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,749Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 19

Summary: Buck starts leaving homemade cookies around the house for Eddie, thinking they’re just a sweet treat. Then Eddie creates a rule. Every cookie he steals from the jar earns him one kiss from Buck. What begins as a joke quickly turns into a daily game of missing cookies, hidden notes, stolen kisses, and two men finding more and more excuses to stay close. The only problem? Eddie really loves Buck’s cookies. 🍪💋

entry.title: man enough
entry.summary:
Author: coreliot

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,850Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 35

Summary: The world hits Eddie Diaz with sharp jabs; punches to the gut, chest, face. And he’s caught, trapped, between the blows—that are fast and hard like snipers to his left, like Greggs with a bullet in his chest, like Shannon bloody on the ground—and relief. Relief that comes quick and far between, like Christopher in his arms, like the 118 by his side, like a cold beer in his kitchen, just him and Buck. He’s always alternating between the two, never not ready for the blow, never not waiting for relief to end. That’s all he’s known, all he’s ever known. Or Eddie’s been the man of the house since he turned 11 years old. – Title from “Placing the Blame” by Self.

entry.title: Punch-Drunk Love
entry.summary:
Author: epublover

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,973Chapters: 7/9Kudos: 19

Summary: Just for the record, Eddie doesn't get a kick out of duping anyone. Lying isn't his thrill of choice, and he much prefers punching.It's summer in Los Angeles, and Eddie's wife is dead. Since everyone insists on handling him with kid gloves now, he figures he might as well trade them in for the fighting kind. Or, the LAFD vs LADP charity boxing match couldn't have come at a better, but worse time.

entry.title: What still might happen
entry.summary:
Author: amisguidedpoet

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,744Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Buck was the closest thing to art Eddie had seen in years. Of course, Eddie didn’t know that at the time. Back then, Buck was just a stranger with golden hair in an empty gallery, talking about a photograph Eddie knew very well. But looking back now, after everything that happened, after everything Buck became, Eddie could see it clearly: Buck was color. And Eddie hadn’t seen much color in a long time. --- The student/professor AU nobody asked for.

entry.title: Love Will Find A Way
entry.summary:
Author: Buddie_Girl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,017Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 64

Summary: “Why are you being weird? Why won’t you talk to me?” Buck asks, looking down at Eddie. “I wrote you every day.” Eddie is now lost. Buck wrote to him? “Huh? You wrote to me?” “No, you’re being weird and dramatic, so I figured I could match your weirdness and dramatics.” Sadness and fear replace Buck’s anger. “Will you just tell me what I did wrong? Are you mad Chris fell asleep on the couch with me?”   Or: This is me using Ryan and Oliver answers for how they would make Buddie cannon from the Nashville con. Eddie is dramatic but I'm not Spanish so no telenovela for me. Buck using Oliver's words as my main promps.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Because Eddie, Lawyers Are Expensive
entry.summary:
Author: buckupbuttercup

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 119,538Chapters: 18/21Kudos: 1,477

Summary: For a long time, he thought it was Shannon. His love for her had ruined him for all women. Now he’s not so sure. All thanks to Father Brian and fucking juice. The juice, it turns out, is gay porn. Which brings him back to the beginning. Porn doesn’t really do it for Eddie. Until now. Until Buck, and his goddamn secret OnlyFans. Or: Eddie's parents sue for custody (fuck the Diaz parents) & Buck starts an OnlyFans to pay for a lawyer. Eddie befriends Father Brian, who encourages him try some gay porn and, well. Then Buck and Eddie make a series of utterly unhinged choices about it. freak4freak tempered with intense character study ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
